title: YTP: Solar Sands Teaches You How to Draw a Perfect Circle #SolarSandsYTP
description:
In this video, Solar Sands takes a dump on a pizza and submits it to a modern art museum. He makes millions.

This is a submission for Solar Sands' YTP contest, which requires a YTP to be made primarily from material on his channel. More on that can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HZRrKSBuwlM

And he's well worth the sub, too!
